creator: avatar@www.mmlab.cse.yzu.edu.tw
text:
Pine 4.04 is out and it's supposed to be a maintainance release.
	This version of ports was based on Adrian Penisoara's pine4 ports.

Fix: Please check & upgrade this ports, thanks.

	Please NOTICE:

		* REMOVED files: patch-ae, patch-at, patch-bq

			patch-ae & patch-at was removed due to they were
			dynamic-generated files(os-bsf.c) during make.

			patch-bq was removed due to no extra shared library is
			needed in this release.

		* NEW files: patch-bs, patch-bt, patch-bu, patch-bv, patch-bw

			these new files are the ingredient of os-bsf.c.
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
